cssRules.css: .float-dialog .chat-assistant:hover > i.float-icon-bigger, .float-dialog .chat-assistant:hover > i.float-icon-bigger ~ i { background-image: none; transform: scale(1); }
.star-score-btns p.active i, .star-score-btns p:hover i { display: block; }
.star-score-btns p.active, .star-score-btns p:hover { border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; font-size: 0px; }

.float-config-btn .float-config-star-result.active, .float-config-btn .float-config-star.active, .float-config-btn:hover .float-config-custom { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-50%) scale(1); visibility: visible; }
.question-wrapper .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:focus + span, .question-wrapper .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover + span { border-color: rgb(25, 25, 25); }
.question-wrapper .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:disabled + span, .question-wrapper .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:disabled:hover + span { border-color: rgb(201, 201, 201); }
.screenshots-wrapper .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:focus + span, .screenshots-wrapper .por-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover + span { border-color: rgb(25, 25, 25); }

.Flexus-detail-reminder-container .por-btn.por-btn-secondary:hover, .Flexus-reminder-modal .por-btn.por-btn-secondary:hover, .FlexusL-reminder-detail .por-btn.por-btn-secondary:hover, .FlexusL-reminder-modal .por-btn.por-btn-secondary:hover, .common-business-reminder-modal .por-btn.por-btn-secondary:hover, .common-reminder-detail .por-btn.por-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: transparent; border-color: grey; color: rgb(25, 25, 25); }

.Flexus-detail-reminder-container .por-btn.por-btn-primary:hover, .Flexus-reminder-modal .por-btn.por-btn-primary:hover, .FlexusL-reminder-detail .por-btn.por-btn-primary:hover, .FlexusL-reminder-modal .por-btn.por-btn-primary:hover, .common-business-reminder-modal .por-btn.por-btn-primary:hover, .common-reminder-detail .por-btn.por-btn-primary:hover { background-color: rgb(89, 89, 89); border-color: rgb(89, 89, 89); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }
.cui-btn-outline-primary .hover, .cui-btn-outline-primary:hover { background-color: rgb(199, 0, 11); border-color: rgb(199, 0, 11); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }
.cui-btn-outline-light .hover, .cui-btn-outline-light:hover { background-color: rgb(199, 0, 11); border-color: rgb(199, 0, 11); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }

cssRules.selector: .header-search-droplist .J-search-related > ul > li:hover .search-block, .header-search-droplist .J-search-related > ul > li:hover > a, .header-search-droplist .J-search-related > ul > li > a.hover
cssRules.css: .header-search-droplist .J-search-related > ul > li:hover .search-block, .header-search-droplist .J-search-related > ul > li:hover > a, .header-search-droplist .J-search-related > ul > li > a.hover { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); }
.header-search-droplist .J-search-related .to-page a:hover, .header-search-droplist .search-block.hover a.hover, .header-search-droplist a.hover { border-color: rgb(25, 25, 25); cursor: pointer; }
.header-tools .header-user .header-user-info-list > li:nth-child(n+3):hover > a { color: rgb(25, 25, 25); text-decoration: underline; }
.header-nav .header-nav-list .header-nav-colorful .header-nav-colorful-text:hover { animation: 2s linear 0s 2 alternate none running textBg, 1s linear 0s 1 normal none running textOpacity; }
.header-nav .header-nav-list .header-nav-colorful .header-nav-colorful-text:hover::before { animation: 2s linear 0s 2 normal forwards running flowState; display: inline-block; }

cssRules.selector: .header-mbshearch-droplist a:active, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:active span, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:hover, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:hover span
cssRules.css: .header-mbshearch-droplist a:active, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:active span, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:hover, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:hover span { color: rgb(25, 25, 25); }
.header-mbshearch-droplist a:active i, .header-mbshearch-droplist a:hover i { border-color: rgb(25, 25, 25); color: rgb(25, 25, 25); }
.footer-service .footer-service-wrapper > ul > li > a:hover .footer-title { color: rgb(25, 25, 25); font-weight: 600; text-decoration: underline; }
